summary.sosovalue: Low volume of genuine community discussion excluding official accounts; neutral to mildly positive sentiment from sporadic mentions highlighting staking rewards (e.g., TVL ~$93M, APY up to 20.87%, airdrops), ecosystem utility (AI-driven insights, index funds), and project solidity, with some promotional activity.
summary.sodex: Positive engagement around platform activity, including Week 8 snapshot, volume creation, referrals for boosts, and tier progression (e.g., Silver to Gold); users expressing intent to participate and stay involved.
summary.ssi: Minimal relevant crypto-related discussion; unrelated mentions (e.g., anime fandom drama, non-crypto SSI) dominate; neutral overall for SSI Index in crypto context.
